testimonials_title: Our Clients' Trust is Our Success Secret
testimonial1_comment: I purchased a residential unit from the project and it was a very smooth experience. The team guided us through every step from booking to handover.
testimonial2_comment: The location is excellent and the designs are modern. It was a very successful investment and I am satisfied with the services provided.
testimonial3_comment: The financing options were very flexible and made it easy for me to own a unit comfortably and conveniently.
testimonial4_comment: The projects are well-organized and strategically located. I felt my investment is safe and highly reliable.
testimonial5_comment: Customer service was excellent, and I received clear information about the project and my unit before purchasing.
testimonial6_comment: The support team is always ready to answer any inquiries. A very smooth and comfortable buying and investment experience.
faq_title: Answers to the Most Common Questions
faq1_question: What are the sales office hours?
faq1_answer: The sales office is open from Sunday to Thursday, from 10 AM to 6 PM, providing all information about available projects and units.
faq2_question: Do I need to book an appointment to view the units?
faq2_answer: Yes, it’s recommended to book in advance to ensure the sales team is available to guide you and help choose the best unit.
faq3_question: What financing options are available for purchasing units?
faq3_answer: We offer multiple financing options in cooperation with banks and finance companies, including salary-free financing and Sharia-compliant options.
faq4_question: Can I sell or rent my unit through the company?
faq4_answer: Yes, we provide a service to list your property for sale or rent, with full support from photography to negotiation with buyers or tenants.
faq5_question: Does the company provide after-sales services?
faq5_answer: We offer after-sales support, including unit maintenance assistance and responding to any inquiries to ensure customer satisfaction.
contact_description: Our team is ready to help you choose the best real estate opportunities that suit your needs. Contact us now for a free consultation or to schedule a property viewing.
contact_location_address: Our projects are available in strategic locations across major cities
contact_form_message: Write your inquiry or specify the type of property you're looking for
about_hero_description: We are a specialized center in laser, dermatology, and medical aesthetics, committed to providing the best health and beauty care for every client using the latest medical devices.
about_vision_text: Our vision is to be the leading center in the Kingdom in laser, dermatology, and medical aesthetics, by providing high-quality services based on the latest technologies and medical devices.
about_mission_text: Our mission is to provide a safe and comfortable environment for all our clients, with a specialized medical team ensuring each patient receives the best health and aesthetic care.
about_history_founding_text: We are a modern center specializing in laser, skincare, and medical aesthetics, committed to providing the best services using the latest devices and technologies.
about_history_latest_devices_text: We provide the latest laser and dermatological examination devices to ensure accurate and effective results for every client.
about_history_our_team_text: The center includes a group of qualified dermatologists and aesthetic doctors with extensive experience in various dermatological and cosmetic treatments.
about_values_quality_text: Providing the highest standards of quality and safety in all laser, dermatology, and aesthetic services.
about_values_safety_text: Providing a healthy and safe environment for all clients during all medical and aesthetic procedures.
about_values_innovation_text: Using the latest innovative medical technologies and devices to achieve the best results.
about_values_respect_text: Treating every client with respect and care to ensure a comfortable and exceptional treatment experience.
footer_description: A Saudi company specialized in real estate marketing and development. We connect property seekers with the best available options in the market, while providing flexible and secure financing solutions that meet their needs and aspirations.
footer_rights: All rights reserved for Desim Real Estate.

hero_title: Towards a more advanced real estate future
hero_subtitle: At Daisam, we develop integrated real estate projects that combine high quality and modern design, while offering flexible financing solutions with our partners to meet various needs.
about_home_title: Building a real estate future worthy of your ambitions
about_home_subtitle: At Daisam, we develop modern real estate projects that combine construction quality and contemporary design, providing flexible financing solutions to help you own your property with ease and confidence. We believe that real estate investment is a step towards a better future.
feature1_desc: High quality residential and commercial projects
feature3_desc: Flexible financing plans to suit all clients
why_choose_daisam_desc: We work to offer integrated real estate projects combining quality, innovation, and prime locations to provide the best living and investment experience.
feature_locations_desc: Daisam offers unique investment opportunities with its ideal strategic locations, perfect for individuals seeking comfortable housing and a well-rounded lifestyle.
feature_designs_desc: Daisam relies on over five years of experience to deliver innovative modern designs that align with current trends, balancing aesthetics and quality.
feature_sustainability_desc: Daisam strives to achieve the highest standards of safety and sustainability in its projects, using modern technologies to ensure safe and sustainable environments that enhance quality of life.
licensed_by_desc: At Daisam, we adhere to the highest standards of quality and transparency. We operate under the supervision of official and accredited authorities in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, ensuring a safe and reliable investment.
our_services_desc: We offer a comprehensive range of real estate services to meet the needs of individuals and investors with the highest standards of quality and professionalism.
real_estate_marketing_desc: We provide integrated solutions to display and market properties through specialized digital platforms, professional designs, and targeted ads to reach interested clients.
service_marketing_3: Those looking to sell or rent their properties
real_estate_finance_desc: We help you obtain suitable real estate financing in cooperation with our accredited partners.
list_your_property_desc: Whether you are an individual or a developer, you can easily market your property with us. Just send the property info, and we will handle the rest.
success_partners_desc: We are proud to collaborate with trusted partners to support our projects and provide the best solutions to our clients.
latest_projects_desc: Distinctive residential units that provide you with the comfort and privacy you are looking for.
